text:
Once upon a time in the enchanted forests of Everdale, there was a wise old owl named Orion. He lived in a cozy hollow near a babbling brook, nestled among towering oaks that whispered ancient secrets. Orion wasn't just wise; he could predict the weather with a whistle, could play the guitar quieter than a hush, and had a collection of pebbles that held memories from every animal he'd ever befriended.

One sunny afternoon, Orion decided he wanted a snack. He swooped down towards the stream, his feathers gleaming in the pale sunlight. As he reached the water's edge, something unusual caught his eye—a peculiar pattern etched into a stone.

It wasn't merely a rock. It was a map! Orion knew he had to find the hidden entrance it pointed to. He scoured the forest floor, feeling around with his legs. After a considerable amount of searching, his claws found the faint groove.

Entering the passage beneath the tree, Orion
